name: Second Generation Biofuel Producer Credit

eligibility.description: Producers of liquid fuel derived from qualified feedstocks (like algae or lignocellulosic matter) registered with the EPA and the IRS.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a credit of $1.01 per gallon for qualified second generation biofuel production through December 31, 2024.
